---
# Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
# Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial
title: "Customize {{< var validmind.checker >}}"
date: last-modified
listing:
  - id: check-documents
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    max-description-length: 250
    sort: false
    fields: [title, description]
    contents:
    - ../../documentation/check-documents-for-compliance.qmd
    - ../../about/overview-llm-features.qmd
aliases:
  - /guide/templates/customize-virtual-document-validator.html
includes:
    customize: true
---

Manage the regulations and policies and their attached assessments available when you use the {{< var validmind.checker >}}.

{{< include /guide/templates/_what-is-document-checker.qmd >}}

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to perform the tasks in this guide.[^1]

:::

## Manage regulations and policies

::: {.callout}
Default regulations provided by {{< var vm.product >}} cannot be edited.[^2]
:::

{{< include /guide/templates/_regulations-policies.qmd >}}

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

2.  Under {{< fa shield >}} Governance, select **Regulations & Policies**.

3. Add or edit a regulation or policy:

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Add regulations or policies

{{< include /guide/templates/_add-regulations-policies.qmd >}}

#### Edit regulations or policies

a. Hover over the regulation or policy you want to edit.

b. When the **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** menu appears, click on it and select **{{< fa pencil >}} Edit** to make changes to the:

    - **[regulation or policy name]{.smallcaps}**
    - (Optional) **[description]{.smallcaps}**

c. Click **Update Regulation or Policy** to save your edits.

:::

## Manage assessments

::: {.callout}
## Default assessments provided by {{< var vm.product >}} cannot be edited, only cloned.

Cloned assessments can then be edited.
:::

{{< include /guide/templates/_assessments.qmd >}}

To manage an assessment:

1. [Add or clone an assessment](#add-or-clone-assessments)
2. [Add or edit assessment questions](#add-or-edit-assessment-questions)

### Add or clone assessments

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

2.  Under {{< fa shield >}} Governance, select **Regulations & Policies**.

3. Select the regulation or policy you want to add or clone an assessment for by clicking on it.

4. Add or clone an assessment:

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Add assessments

{{< include /guide/templates/_add-assessments.qmd >}}

#### Clone assessments

::: {.callout}
Cloned assessments are the same assessment type and are available to the same document types as the original assessment.

:::

a. Hover over the assessment you want to clone.

b. When the **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** menu appears, click on it and select **{{< fa copy >}} Clone Assessment** to make changes to the:

    - **[regulation or policy name]{.smallcaps}**
    - (Optional) **[description]{.smallcaps}**

c. Click **Clone Assessment** to save a copy of the assessment.

d. Once cloned, add or edit the assessment questions.[^3]

:::

### Add or edit assessment questions

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

2.  Under {{< fa shield >}} Governance, select **Regulations & Policies**.

3. Select the regulation or policy you want to add or clone an assessment for by clicking on it.

4. Select the assessment you want to modify by clicking on it.

5. Add or edit assessment questions:


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Add assessment questions

{{< include /guide/templates/_add-assessment-questions.qmd >}}

### Edit assessment questions

::: {.callout title="How do I locate a specific question?"}
Click **{{<fa magnifying-glass >}} Search** to enter your keywords, then press **Search** to narrow down results.
:::

a. Hover over the question you want to edit.

b. When the **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** menu appears, click on it and select **{{< fa pencil >}} Edit** to make changes to the **[question]{.smallcaps}**.

c. Click **Update Question** to save your changes.

:::

## Learn more

::: {#check-documents}
:::

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)

[^2]: [What regulations are supported by default?](#default-regulations)

[^3]: [Add or edit assessment questions](#add-or-edit-assessment-questions)
